category_sources: Official homepage describes GTS as a library for 3D surfaces meshed with interconnected triangles.
source_facts.description says GTS is the GNU triangulated surface library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage says GTS stands for the GNU Triangulated Surface Library.
source_facts.description expands GTS as GNU triangulated surface library.
docs_sources: Official project site hosts installation instructions.
Official project site hosts the GTS Library Reference Manual.
source_facts.homepage is the official GTS project site.
repo_sources: Official GTS homepage links a Darcs repository as the developmental source-control repository and notes CVS is obsolete.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists Delaunay triangulations, robust geometric predicates, surface operations, and C implementation.
source_facts.description supports triangulated-surface and library tags.
